Name: Depth of Field
Description: Controls camera focus simulation and lens blur parameters, including aperture, focus distance, custom blur zones, autofocus behavior, and bokeh shaping.

Fields.Name: Enable Depth of Field
Fields.Description: Enables or disables depth of field blur simulation.

Fields.Name: F-Number
Fields.Description: Controls aperture size; lower values produce stronger blur and shallower depth of field.

Fields.Name: Focus Distance
Fields.Description: Sets the world-space distance from the camera where the image appears sharpest.

Fields.Name: CCD Size
Fields.Description: Defines the virtual sensor size, affecting blur scaling and depth perception.

Fields.Name: Adaptive Aperture Factor
Fields.Description: Scales aperture dynamically based on field of view to maintain consistent blur behavior.

Fields.Name: Adaptive Aperture Base FOV
Fields.Description: Reference field of view used when calculating adaptive aperture scaling.

Fields.Name: Rotate Scale
Fields.Description: Controls rotational distortion applied to bokeh highlights.

Fields.Name: Rotate Offset in Radians
Fields.Description: Applies an angular offset to bokeh rotation.

Fields.Name: Aperture Front Number of Levels
Fields.Description: Controls the number of aperture blade subdivisions affecting foreground bokeh shape.

Fields.Name: Aperture Back Number of Levels
Fields.Description: Controls aperture blade subdivisions affecting background bokeh shape.

Fields.Name: Diaphragm Rotate
Fields.Description: Rotates the simulated aperture diaphragm, changing bokeh orientation.

Fields.Name: Edge Quality
Fields.Description: Controls blur precision and artifact reduction around object edges.

Fields.Name: Background Mask Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold used to separate foreground and background during blur masking.

Fields.Name: Enable Custom Depth of Field
Fields.Description: Enables manual near/far blur zone configuration.

Fields.Name: Custom: Enable Near
Fields.Description: Enables custom near-field blur settings.

Fields.Name: Near Depth Start
Fields.Description: Distance where near blur begins.

Fields.Name: Near Depth End
Fields.Description: Distance where near blur reaches full intensity.

Fields.Name: Near Circle of Confusion: Size
Fields.Description: Maximum blur radius for near-field out-of-focus areas.

Fields.Name: Near Circle of Confusion: Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the intensity of near blur.

Fields.Name: Custom: Enable Far
Fields.Description: Enables custom far-field blur settings.

Fields.Name: Far Depth Start
Fields.Description: Distance where far blur begins.

Fields.Name: Far Depth End
Fields.Description: Distance where far blur reaches full intensity.

Fields.Name: Far Circle of Confusion: Size
Fields.Description: Distance where far blur reaches full intensity.

Fields.Name: Far Circle of Confusion: Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the intensity of far blur.

Fields.Name: Far Distance Threshold
Fields.Description: Distance threshold for transitioning into far blur.

Fields.Name: Enable Auto-Focus
Fields.Description: Automatically adjusts focus distance based on scene depth.

Fields.Name: Do Not Pass Over Focus
Fields.Description: Prevents autofocus from overshooting the target focus distance.

Fields.Name: Focus Sensitivity
Fields.Description: Controls how responsive autofocus is to depth changes.

Fields.Name: Focus Speed Limit
Fields.Description: Limits the maximum speed of focus transitions.

Fields.Name: Focus Delay
Fields.Description: Adds delay before autofocus reacts to depth changes.

Fields.Name: Focus Distance Range Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum distance autofocus is allowed to target.

Fields.Name: Focus Distance Range Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum distance autofocus is allowed to target.

Fields.Name: Focus Screen Position: X
Fields.Description: Horizontal screen coordinate used for autofocus sampling.

Fields.Name: Focus Screen Position: Y
Fields.Description: Vertical screen coordinate used for autofocus sampling.
